task_completion.description: Rocket.Chat application is open and logged in.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Rocket.Chat main user interface is visible, showing the sidebar and chat area.

task_completion.description: The #release-updates channel is selected and active.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The #release-updates channel is highlighted in the left sidebar and its name appears in the chat header.

task_completion.description: The message announcing release 8.1.0 is visible in the chat.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A chat message explicitly mentioning release '8.1.0' and the date '2026-02-10' is visible in the main chat area.

task_completion.description: The agent interacts with the target message to add a reaction.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The message action menu (hover menu) is visible on the target message, or the emoji picker dialog is open.

task_completion.description: A thumbs-up emoji reaction is added to the target message.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A thumbs-up emoji (👍) is visible as a reaction badge directly attached to the bottom of the message announcing release 8.1.0.

integrity.description: The agent used the Rocket.Chat GUI to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Rocket.Chat web or desktop interface, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The reaction was added to the correct message, not a different one.
integrity.visual_evidence: The thumbs-up reaction is specifically on the message for release 8.1.0, not on other release announcements or random messages.

integrity.description: The reaction appears as a genuine Rocket.Chat reaction badge.
integrity.visual_evidence: The thumbs-up emoji appears in the standard Rocket.Chat reaction badge format below the message, not typed as text (e.g., ':thumbsup:') in a new reply.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Channel: #release-updates. Target Message: Announcement for release 8.1.0, published on 2026-02-10. Target Emoji: thumbsup (👍).
